description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named 'build Antora documentation' that runs on workflow dispatch, pull request opened, synchronize, reopened, and push to main branch. The workflow should check out the repository with recursive submodules, set up Ruby 3.0, and then check out additional repositories for Vulkan-Site and antora-ui-khronos. It should install dependencies, build the UI bundle, prepare samples, and build the Antora documentation with stacktrace.
